challenges.name: Detect & Read
challenges.description: Detect an NFC card and read its UID
instructions: Navigate to NFC > Read on your Flipper Zero
Place an NFC card on the Proxmark reader
The system will verify your successful read
hints: Keep the card flat on the reader
Try different card orientations if not detected

challenges.name: Clone Card
challenges.description: Read an NFC card's UID and clone it to a magic card
instructions: Step 1: Read the target NFC card UID
Step 2: Write the UID to a magic card (Gen1a/Gen2)
Step 3: Present the cloned card for verification
challenges.failure_message: Clone verification failed - UIDs don't match
hints: Use a Gen1a magic card for best compatibility
Make sure to write the complete UID

challenges.name: MIFARE Attack
challenges.description: Perform a nested attack to recover MIFARE Classic keys
instructions: Place a MIFARE Classic card on the reader
Use Flipper or Proxmark to perform nested attack
Recover at least one sector key
The system will verify key recovery
challenges.success_message: Attack successful! Keys recovered for sector {sector}
hints: Nested attack requires at least one known key
